content:
KnownOrigin doesn't get the same level of attention as the Foundation marketplace, and probably for no good reason either. I'm always blown away by the art minted on the platform and that it's usually still available to purchase.

Today's feature is on artist Designer Harry who joined the KnownOrigin artist community on December 12th, 2021 after being accepted for Foundation in May 2021 and minted on OpenSea in July 2021.

Designer Harry

Engineer turned artist, creating digital motion arts and generative arts.

There are three artworks in Designer Harry's collection on KnownOrigin named Pride, Tranquility and Prismatic. Each a colorful shimmer as if the original image was shaken momentarily in a bath of rainbows. The arrangement of the outer artworks are thoughtfully minted in order to focus the eye on the now sold Tranquility. The colorful generative brushed arts are made with Java code processing.

"You are way stronger than you believe, just keep sparkling like colors because this is all your delightful soul needs to reflect." Designer Harry.

VENOM is from the GENLiquids Collection on OpenSea where we get to feel what the lines of colors are communicating...during a 42 second performance.

'"GENLiquids" is a collection of 5 genuine liquids having generative motion effect, generated with pure love and algorithms in processing." Designer Harry.

GENLiquids is my favourite of the three generative art collections of Designer Harry on OpenSea yet not a single one has found a collector (yet). GENSkull on the other hand has completely sold out with all seven artworks finding a home.

Oh there is ONE on the market... titled Galaxy Edge; a 20 second reverse constructed skull. Watch on Twitter:

I enjoy seeing artists experiment with their minting collections and locations. Designer Harry has courageously left his 10,000 Instagram followers to begin again by building an audience across KnownOrigin, Foundation and OpenSea marketplaces.

You can follow his journey on Twitter at @dailycreatics.
